rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1096 governs a council's duties regarding service-enriched housing coordination and biennial reporting. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
The council shall:
(1) develop and implement policies to coordinate and increase state efforts to offer service-enriched housing;
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns interagency housing/health services coordination and biennial reporting, not property tax exemptions.
